summary: Completed testing of Image Generation to Video Generation integration feature. Successfully authenticated and verified UI components, navigation, and code implementation. Backend APIs working (47/48 tests passed). Frontend pages accessible with proper form elements and integration code in place.

minor_issues.issue: CORS headers not properly configured in OPTIONS responses
minor_issues.impact: May cause issues with cross-origin requests in some browsers

integration_limitations.issue: Cannot test end-to-end integration without valid API keys for image generation
affected_features: Create Video from This Image button appearance
integration_limitations.details: All integration code is properly implemented but requires actual image generation to test the full workflow

passed_tests: Backend health check and API structure (47/48 tests passed)
Authentication with test session token successful
Image Generation page loads with proper navigation
Image Generation form elements present (prompt input, generate button, provider selection)
Image Generation data-testid attributes present for testing
Video Generation page loads with proper navigation
Video Generation form elements present (prompt input, generate button, tabs)
Video Generation data-testid attributes present for testing
All three video generation tabs present (Text/Image, Avatar, Motion)
Image upload area present for image-to-video functionality
Navigation between Image Generation and Video Generation pages works
Code analysis confirms integration features are properly implemented
handleCreateVideo function properly navigates with image state
Video Generation page handles sourceImage state from navigation
From Image Generation badge component implemented
Prompt transfer logic implemented in navigation state
action_item_for_main_agent: Integration features are properly implemented in code but cannot be fully tested without valid API keys. Consider configuring EMERGENT_LLM_KEY or other API keys to enable end-to-end testing of the image generation and transfer workflow.

success_percentage.backend: 98% (47/48 tests passed - only CORS configuration minor issue)
success_percentage.frontend: 85% (all UI components and navigation working, integration code implemented but not testable without API keys)
